docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ANGELESCO, JOSEPH AS TO DEFENDANT SANTORO, DEAN SUMMONS ISSUED
JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED BY PLAINTIFF
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ANGELESCO, JOSEPH SERVED JUL-29-1997, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SANTORO, DEAN
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT SANTORO, DEAN

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ANGELESCO, JOSEPH RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SANTORO, DEAN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 506 DIVISADERO ST #15, LEASE FORFEITED, NOTATION MADE ON ORIGINAL INSTRUMENT PER C.R.C. 522
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT SANTORO, DEAN
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $12.41 FILED BY PLAINTIFF ANGELESCO, JOSEPH
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT SANTORO, DEAN
